ambiguities.description: U9 (TUSB8040PFP) has many pins; exact pin-to-net mapping for downstream port pins (DN2, DN3) is difficult to read precisely from image density — some pin numbers may be misassigned.
USB3_1_SSTXN and USB3_1_SSTXP nets appear on the schematic going to J6 (SSTX/SSTX-) but exact routing through protection ICs is partially obscured.
USB3_2_SSTXN and USB3_2_SSTXP routing through U26 to J5 is partially obscured.
USB3_2_SSTXN, USB3_2_SSTXP net labels appear in the NET_LABELS list but their connections via U26 are not clearly legible.
R84, R85 exact net connections (to PWROND or similar control lines) are unclear from image resolution.
R55 placement relative to J6 SSRX lines and its exact net label connections could not be fully traced.
GRSTz pin of U9 connects via R81 (USB_RESETn), the exact net label could not be confirmed - may be USB_RESETn which is not in the validated net label list.
J9 and J14 exact connector type and all pin assignments are not fully legible; USB_INT1 and USB_INT2 signal origins within U9 are unclear.
